title: Otostylis alba
taxonomy: Otostylis alba belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is a genus of terrestrial orchids. The classification of Otostylis alba is further categorized as a flowering plant within the monocot clade. Specifically, it falls under the subfamily Orchidoideae and is native to Africa. Otostylis alba is often found growing in grasslands and rocky areas.

intro: Otostylis alba, also known as white otostylis, is a medicinal plant belonging to the orchid family. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing stress, improving digestion, and supporting immune system function. The bioactive constituents of Otostylis alba include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, such as protostephanine and protostephanine methine. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems.
